name: studio
description: Remotion 视频渲染工程（包裹 @anichart/core 逐帧渲成 mp4）—— 未来视频导出功能的种子

scripts.render:aa: remotion render AA out/aa-silent.mp4 --scale=2 && ffmpeg -y -i out/aa-silent.mp4 -i public/neon-route.wav -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 320k -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -af volume=0.7 -movflags +faststart out/aa-4k.mp4 && rm -f out/aa-silent.mp4
scripts.render:aazh: remotion render AAZh out/aazh-silent.mp4 --scale=2 && ffmpeg -y -i out/aazh-silent.mp4 -i public/neon-route.wav -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 320k -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -af volume=0.7 -movflags +faststart out/aazh-4k.mp4 && rm -f out/aazh-silent.mp4
scripts.render:steamzh: remotion render SteamZh out/steamzh-silent.mp4 --scale=2 && ffmpeg -y -i out/steamzh-silent.mp4 -i public/skyforge-overdrive-2.wav -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 320k -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -af volume=0.7 -movflags +faststart out/steamzh-4k.mp4 && rm -f out/steamzh-silent.mp4
scripts.render:evzh: remotion render EVZh out/evzh-silent.mp4 --scale=2 && ffmpeg -y -i out/evzh-silent.mp4 -i public/helios-grid-rising.wav -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 320k -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -af volume=0.7 -movflags +faststart out/evzh-4k.mp4 && rm -f out/evzh-silent.mp4
scripts.render:evzh-vertical: remotion render EVZhVertical out/evzh-vertical-silent.mp4 --scale=2 && ffmpeg -y -i out/evzh-vertical-silent.mp4 -i public/helios-grid-rising.wav -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 320k -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -af volume=0.7 -movflags +faststart out/evzh-vertical-4k.mp4 && rm -f out/evzh-vertical-silent.mp4
scripts.render:povertyzh: remotion render PovertyZh out/povertyzh-silent.mp4 --scale=2 && ffmpeg -y -i out/povertyzh-silent.mp4 -i public/violin-ledger.wav -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 320k -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -af volume=0.85 -movflags +faststart out/povertyzh-4k.mp4 && rm -f out/povertyzh-silent.mp4
scripts.render:povertyzh-vertical: remotion render PovertyZhVertical out/povertyzh-vertical-silent.mp4 --scale=2 && ffmpeg -y -i out/povertyzh-vertical-silent.mp4 -i public/violin-ledger.wav -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 320k -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -af volume=0.85 -movflags +faststart out/povertyzh-vertical-4k.mp4 && rm -f out/povertyzh-vertical-silent.mp4
